allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process is running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Output "FAIL: process exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Write-Output "--- stderr ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "--- stdout ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process is running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stderr \(filtered\) ---"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String -NotMatch "wgpu_hal::vulkan|egui_wgpu|wgpu_core" } else { Write-Output "FAIL: process exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\form.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force; Write-Output "--- stdout \(head\) ---"; Get-Content stdout.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 } else { Write-Output "FAIL: exit $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath ".\\target\\debug\\mgdpdf.exe" -ArgumentList "tests\\fixtures\\hello.pdf" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput stdout.log -RedirectStandardError stderr.log; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "OK: process running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force } else { Write-Output "FAIL: exit $\($proc.ExitCode\)"; Get-Content stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Remove-Item stdout.log,stderr.log -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(cargo build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; cargo test --test free_text_roundtrip 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result|panicked|error\\[" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) })
PowerShell(cargo test --test free_text_roundtrip 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result|panicked|assert|error\\[" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) })
PowerShell(cargo build 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 6; cargo test --quiet 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) })

PowerShell(cargo test --quiet 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "test result" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) }; cargo build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "warning:" | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\(\) } | Sort-Object -Unique)
